title: wedelia robusta
intro: Wedelia robusta, also known as Goat's Head or Crow's Flower, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions, particularly in Central and South America, and is a member of the sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Wedelia robusta include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
